query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, startTimeEst, gameStatus, awayBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML, awayModelSpread, modelTotal, modelRunAt FROM games WHERE league = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-19' ORDER BY startTimeEst LIMIT 50;
